nameMeanings.name: Morton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

variants.name: Moreton
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Murton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in northern England, all named in Old English as ‘settlement or enclosure at the marsh or moor’, from mōr ‘marsh, fen, moor’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. There has been considerable confusion with both Morton and Merton .

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Morton IV was born on 15 May 1400, in Bawtry, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Morton Sr., was 24 and his mother, Cicely Kniveton, was 16. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Ales Alice Bozon. He died in Bawtry, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Morton IV est né le 15 mai 1400, à Bawtry, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Morton Sr., avait 24 ans et sa mère, Cicely Kniveton, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Ales Alice Bozon. Il est décédé à Bawtry, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Morton IV am 15. Mai 1400 in Bawtry, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Morton Sr. 24 und seine Mutter Cicely Kniveton 16. Er hatte mit Ales Alice Bozon mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Bawtry, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Morton IV è nato il il 15 maggio 1400 nel Bawtry, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Morton Sr., aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Cicely Kniveton, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Ales Alice Bozon. Morì nel Bawtry, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Bawtry, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバウトリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Morton IVが1400年5月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアバウトリーで生まれた時，父Robert Morton Sr.は24歳，母Cicely Knivetonは16歳であった。彼はAles Alice Bozonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバウトリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Morton IV(이)가 1400년 5월 15일 영국 요르크실르 바w트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Morton Sr.(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Kniveton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Ales Alice Bozon(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바w트리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Morton IV nasceu em 15 de maio de 1400, em Bawtry, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Morton Sr., tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Kniveton, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Ales Alice Bozon. Ele faleceu em Bawtry, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Morton IV родился 15 мая 1400 г. в местности бавтри, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Morton Sr. было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Cicely Kniveton, 16. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Ales Alice Bozon. Он умер в местности бавтри, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Morton IV nació el 15 de mayo de 1400, en Bawtry, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Morton Sr., tenía 24 años y su mamá, Cicely Kniveton, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Ales Alice Bozon. Murió en Bawtry, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
